testcase.name: testServerStartsAndResponds
testcase.system-out: === Setting up test on port 4570 === No existing weather data found - starting with empty store Weather Aggregation Server started on port 4570 Lamport Clock initialized at: 0 30-second expiry rule active - content servers must communicate within 30s Test server ready on port 4570 TEST: Server starts and responds to connections ✓ Server is running and accepting connections

testcase.name: testWeatherDataProcessing
testcase.system-out: === Setting up test on port 4571 === No existing weather data found - starting with empty store Weather Aggregation Server started on port 4571 Lamport Clock initialized at: 0 30-second expiry rule active - content servers must communicate within 30s Test server ready on port 4571 TEST: Weather data processing and JSON conversion ✓ Weather data processing works correctly

testcase.name: testContentServerPutOperation
testcase.system-out: === Setting up test on port 4572 === No existing weather data found - starting with empty store Weather Aggregation Server started on port 4572 Lamport Clock initialized at: 0 30-second expiry rule active - content servers must communicate within 30s Test server ready on port 4572 TEST: ContentServer can PUT data to server ContentServer initialized Server URL: http://localhost:4572 File path: simple-test-weather.txt Lamport Clock: 0 Request: PUT /weather.json HTTP/1.1 [Clock: 1] Updated Lamport clock to: 2 (received: 1) PUT: Received 260 chars from /127.0.0.1:63771 PUT Response: 201 Created [Clock: 4] Successfully sent weather data for station: SIMPLE001 ✓ ContentServer PUT operation successful PUT: Created new station SIMPLE001 from /127.0.0.1:63771 [Clock: 3]

testcase.name: testLamportClockFunctionality
testcase.system-out: === Setting up test on port 4573 === No existing weather data found - starting with empty store Weather Aggregation Server started on port 4573 Lamport Clock initialized at: 0 30-second expiry rule active - content servers must communicate within 30s Test server ready on port 4573 TEST: Lamport clocks are working in components ✓ Lamport clock functionality verified
testcase.system-err: Warning: Could not rename backup to main storage file

testcase.name: testErrorHandling
testcase.system-out: === Setting up test on port 4574 === No existing weather data found - starting with empty store Weather Aggregation Server started on port 4574 Lamport Clock initialized at: 0 30-second expiry rule active - content servers must communicate within 30s Test server ready on port 4574 TEST: System handles errors gracefully GETClient initialized Server URL: http://localhost:9999 Lamport Clock: 0 ✓ Error handling works correctly
testcase.system-err: Error connecting to server: Connection refused (Connection refused) Make sure the server is running at: http://localhost:9999 Warning: Could not rename backup to main storage file

testcase.name: testGetClientRetrievesData
testcase.system-out:
=== Setting up test on port 4575 === No existing weather data found - starting with empty store Weather Aggregation Server started on port 4575 Lamport Clock initialized at: 0 30-second expiry rule active - content servers must communicate within 30s Test server ready on port 4575 TEST: GETClient can retrieve data from server ContentServer initialized Server URL: http://localhost:4575 File path: simple-test-weather.txt Lamport Clock: 0 Request: PUT /weather.json HTTP/1.1 [Clock: 1] Updated Lamport clock to: 2 (received: 1) PUT: Received 260 chars from /127.0.0.1:63770 PUT Response: 201 Created [Clock: 4] Successfully sent weather data for station: SIMPLE001 PUT: Created new station SIMPLE001 from /127.0.0.1:63770 [Clock: 3] GETClient initialized Server URL: http://localhost:4575 Lamport Clock: 0 Request: GET /weather.json HTTP/1.1 [Clock: 4] Updated Lamport clock to: 5 (received: 1) GET: Served 1 weather stations [Clock: 6] GET Response: 200 OK [Clock: 7]
=== Weather Data Feed === Total stations available: 1
--- Weather Station 1 --- id: SIMPLE001 name: Simple Test Station state: VIC time_zone: EST lat: -37.8 lon: 144.9 air_temp: 20.5 apparent_t: 0.0 dewpt: 0.0 press: 0.0 rel_hum: 65 wind_spd_kmh: 10 wind_spd_kt: 0 ✓ GETClient retrieval successful
testcase.system-err: Warning: Could not rename backup to main storage file

testcase.name: testMultipleClients
testcase.system-out:
=== Setting up test on port 4576 === No existing weather data found - starting with empty store Weather Aggregation Server started on port 4576 Lamport Clock initialized at: 0 30-second expiry rule active - content servers must communicate within 30s Test server ready on port 4576 TEST: Multiple GET clients can access server ContentServer initialized Server URL: http://localhost:4576 File path: simple-test-weather.txt Lamport Clock: 0 Request: PUT /weather.json HTTP/1.1 [Clock: 1] Updated Lamport clock to: 2 (received: 1) PUT: Received 260 chars from /127.0.0.1:63769 PUT Response: 201 Created [Clock: 4] Successfully sent weather data for station: SIMPLE001 PUT: Created new station SIMPLE001 from /127.0.0.1:63769 [Clock: 3] GETClient initialized Server URL: http://localhost:4576 Lamport Clock: 0 Request: GET /weather.json HTTP/1.1 [Clock: 4] Updated Lamport clock to: 5 (received: 1) GET: Served 1 weather stations [Clock: 6] GET Response: 200 OK [Clock: 7]
=== Weather Data Feed === Total stations available: 1
--- Weather Station 1 --- id: SIMPLE001 name: Simple Test Station state: VIC time_zone: EST lat: -37.8 lon: 144.9 air_temp: 20.5 apparent_t: 0.0 dewpt: 0.0 press: 0.0 rel_hum: 65 wind_spd_kmh: 10 wind_spd_kt: 0 Client 0 completed: true GETClient initialized Server URL: http://localhost:4576 Lamport Clock: 0 Request: GET /weather.json HTTP/1.1 [Clock: 7] Updated Lamport clock to: 8 (received: 1) GET: Served 1 weather stations [Clock: 9] GET Response: 200 OK [Clock: 10]
=== Weather Data Feed === Total stations available: 1
--- Weather Station 1 --- id: SIMPLE001 name: Simple Test Station state: VIC time_zone: EST lat: -37.8 lon: 144.9 air_temp: 20.5 apparent_t: 0.0 dewpt: 0.0 press: 0.0 rel_hum: 65 wind_spd_kmh: 10 wind_spd_kt: 0 Client 1 completed: true ✓ Multiple concurrent clients successful
testcase.system-err: Warning: Could not rename backup to main storage file
